_comment: Per-job missed-fire catch-up policy. Every enabled job in system3_job_scheduler.json must have an entry here (or fall back to 'default'). condition values are handled by core/engine/system3_scheduler_catchup.py's CONDITION_HANDLERS registry.

default.description: No policy defined for this job — conservative default is no catch-up at all, exact-time fire only.

self_healing_watchdog.description: Not market-dependent. Safe to catch up any time within 60 minutes of its 08:30 schedule.

datasource_health_check.description: Pre-market health probe. Catch up only if market hasn't opened yet (09:15 IST) and within 60 minutes of schedule_time.

dashboard_endpoint_coverage.description: Pre-market probe, same rule as datasource_health_check.

auto_coordinator_premarket.description: Must complete before market opens at 09:15 IST — catch up any time between schedule_time and market open.

dhan_instruments_sync.description: Instrument master must be fresh before market open OR before the first paper_lifecycle_proof run today, whichever governs — needed for valid_option_contract proof.

daily_gain_rank.description: Narrow catch-up window (09:15-09:45 IST) on trading days only — ranking must reflect market-open conditions, not stale data hours later.

paper_lifecycle_proof.description: Only catch up while market is genuinely open AND broker connection proof AND valid option contract proof both exist.

ui_market_cross_verify.description: Only meaningful while market is open.

daily_gain_validate.description: Post-market only — validates predictions vs actual NSE results, must run after 15:30 IST close.

daily_gain_trend.description: Depends on daily_gain_validate output existing first.

daily_prediction_benchmark.description: Skips with explicit notice if daily_gain_validate didn't succeed today first (own internal check) — catch-up here just needs post-market timing.

system3_post_market_pipeline.description: Needs validation + benchmark artifacts to compute friction/gap/gate metrics.

auto_retrain.description: Only catch up if a retrain signal file actually exists — never run an unconditional retrain.

dashboard_browser_proof.description: Needs the live API reachable to screenshot — catch up post-market if /api/health responds.

auto_coordinator_post_market.description: Evening proof refresh, needs validation artifacts to exist.

paper_day_proof_pack.description: Needs browser proof status.json and post-market pipeline output to exist first.

bhavcopy_download.description: NSE bhavcopy is typically published after market close — catch up any time post-market.

signal_engine_bhavcopy.description: Only catch up once bhavcopy_download has actually produced today's file.

weekly_repo_authority_audit.description: Read-only weekly scan, no market/upstream dependency. Wide same-day catch-up window is safe since it only reads the repo.
